header.description: Invoice metadata and customer billing information.

rows.description: Line items associated with the invoice.

semantics: Scalars are pulled from the parent `invoices` table or joined tables. Row tokens are pulled from `invoice_items`. Computed fields use declarative math operations. Unresolved fields default to empty strings.
transformations: Format invoice_date and due_date as dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS.
Calculate balance_due as total_amount minus payment_made.
Calculate row_discount as 0.00 (default) or derived from rate/qty/amount if logic changes.
Format all currency values with 2 decimal places.
